talks.title: Hello and Welcome: Documentation in the Rust Ecosystem
talks.description: An examination of documentation quality in the Rust ecosystem, with practical ways maintainers and contributors can make crate documentation more discoverable, complete, and welcoming.

talks.title: A Tale of Teaching Rust
talks.description: Lessons from teaching Rust to 26 undergraduates, including how newcomers understood its key concepts and what their experience suggests about teaching Rust well.

talks.title: Software Identity in the Vulnerability Management Ecosystem
talks.description: A panel on software identity in vulnerability management, covering CPE, pURL, OmniBOR, and the role of software identifiers in CVE Records.

talks.title: Memory Safety and the Future of Vulnerabilities
talks.event: Cal Poly Pomona SWIFT Tech Symposium 2025
talks.description: How wider adoption of memory-safe languages may reshape the vulnerability landscape and make other classes of weaknesses more important.
